_meta.method: Web research on Sanbo Zen lineage in the Philippines (Zen Center Manila and affiliates) and Chung Tai Philippines branch.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Medium-high for the Sanbo Zen lineage centers (Manila, Baguio, Iloilo, Cotabato, Davao). Adequate coverage of the Chung Tai institutional branch.
knownGaps: Holy Mountain Zen Center referenced in brief not verified to a current independent URL; the Mountain Sangha / Baguio Zen Center may be its successor.
Plum Village Philippines lay sanghas not enumerated with separate URLs.
No Sotoshu-listed Soto Zen temple in the Philippines found in official directory.

places.name: Zen Center Manila (Heroes Hill Zendo)
places.address: Heroes Hill, Quezon City, Metro Manila, Philippines
places.notes: Sanbo Zen lineage center founded by Sr. Elaine MacInnes OLM with Yamada Koun Roshi (1976); regular Zazenkai at Heroes Hill Zendo.

places.name: Baguio Zen Center (Mountain Sangha)
places.notes: Mountain Sangha affiliate of the Zen Center Philippines / Sanbo Zen lineage in Baguio.

places.name: Zen Philippines (Zen Center of Oriental Spirituality)
places.notes: Founding Sanbo Zen sangha in the Philippines (1976) under Sr. Elaine MacInnes / Yamada Koun Roshi lineage; community of zen practitioners.

places.name: Iloilo Zen Center
places.notes: Sanbo Zen affiliate consolidated under Zen Center Manila by Elda Paz Perez, 2014.

places.name: Davao Zen Center
places.notes: Sanbo Zen affiliate consolidated under Zen Center Manila by Elda Paz Perez, 2014.

places.name: Ocean Sky Chan Monastery (Chung Tai Philippines)
places.address: 716 Jose Abad Santos St., Little Baguio, San Juan, Metro Manila, Philippines
places.notes: Philippine branch monastery of Chung Tai Chan; full Chan meditation curriculum.

places.name: Foguangshan IBPS Manila (Mabuhay Temple)
places.address: 656 Pablo Ocampo Sr. Avenue, Malate, Manila
places.notes: Foguangshan IBPS branch monastery serving the Philippines.
